languages.text: "Пусть мою участь решит госпожа Ювенна. Передайте: у Эланы появился союзник".

traits.locale_text: "Пусть мою участь решит госпожа Ювенна. Передайте: у Эланы появился союзник".

languages.text: "Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."
languages.original_text: "Пусть мою участь решит госпожа Ювенна. Передайте: у Эланы появился союзник".

traits.locale_text: "Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."
"Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."
"Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."

languages.text: “让尤文娜女士来决定我的命运吧。告诉她，埃拉娜多了个盟友。”
languages.original_text: "Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."

traits.locale_text: “让尤文娜女士来决定我的命运吧。告诉她，埃拉娜多了个盟友。”

languages.text: « Laissez dame Juvenna décider de mon sort. Dites-lui qu'Elana a gagné {mf|un allié|une alliée}. »
languages.original_text: "Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."

traits.locale_text: « Laissez dame Juvenna décider de mon sort. Dites-lui qu'Elana a gagné {mf|un allié|une alliée}. »

languages.text: "Kaderime Leydi Juvenna karar versin. Ona Elana'nın bir müttefik kazandığını söyle."
languages.original_text: "Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."

traits.locale_text: "Kaderime Leydi Juvenna karar versin. Ona Elana'nın bir müttefik kazandığını söyle."

languages.text: «Que lady Juvenna decida mi destino. Dígale que Elana ha ganado un{mf| aliado|a aliada}».
languages.original_text: "Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."

traits.locale_text: «Que lady Juvenna decida mi destino. Dígale que Elana ha ganado un{mf| aliado|a aliada}».

languages.text: "Lasst Lady Juvenna über mein Schicksal befinden. Sagt Ihr, Elana hat {mf|einen Verbündeten|eine Verbündete} gefunden."
languages.original_text: "Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."

traits.locale_text: "Lasst Lady Juvenna über mein Schicksal befinden. Sagt Ihr, Elana hat {mf|einen Verbündeten|eine Verbündete} gefunden."

languages.text: 「ジュベナ卿に私の運命を委ねます。エレーナは味方を得たことを伝えてください」
languages.original_text: "Let Lady Juvenna decide my fate. Tell her Elana has gained an ally."

traits.locale_text: 「ジュベナ卿に私の運命を委ねます。エレーナは味方を得たことを伝えてください」
